creator: rnordier@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

In private mail, the originator reported that this machine appears to 
require that one of the keys {insert, delete, home, end} is hit before 
standard flags in the BIOS data area are maintained.  If this is the 
case, the machine requires a keypress before it is fully "PC compatible", 
and all bets are off until then.
